description: May, Daisy, Lincoln, and Joey sneak into the castle, navigating past Hydra personnel and security systems. Daisy reassures Joey, who is nervous about fieldwork, while May keeps the team focused on their objectives. Their covert skills are put to the test as they move deeper into the castle to locate Fitz or Simmons without alerting Hydra, and Lincoln readies his powers for anticipated conflict.
location: English castle (site of the monolith / Distant Star Pathfinder facility)

transcript.line: The prisoner's escaped! Seal the perimeter!
